---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new blueprint for Gentepede MCP
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Is this a new blueprint?

If you are proposing a new infrastructure blueprint, please outline:

- Tech stack (language / framework / database):
- Target AWS architecture (ECS / EKS / Lambda + data tier):
- Template family it would use (`ecs` / `lambda` / `eks`) or whether a new family is needed:

See [docs/09-adding-blueprints.md](../../docs/09-adding-blueprints.md) for the end-to-end guide.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you considered.

## Additional Context

Anything else that would help evaluate the request.
